历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10528 → 13663 → 16756 → 19537 → 15562, showing an overall backward trend. It peaked at 19537 in 2024 and rebounded significantly to 15562 in 2025, with large fluctuations in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 15562. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 45 in 2021, 95 in 2022, 97 in 2023, 88 in 2024, and 90 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 93, a slight expansion of 3 students compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 3.3%, which slightly eases competition but with limited effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, showing steady improvement in recent years, enhancing its comprehensive strength and recognition. No significant negative or positive public opinion events were found in the reputation file. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 80th, rated as 'average', indicating moderate attention on short video platforms, with no abnormal application signals. No historical abnormal admission records were found for this university. It has three A-class disciplines: Ethnology A+ (top in China), Chinese Language and Literature A-, and Sociology A-. Ethnology is its flagship discipline, attracting some applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province has grown from 147,000 in 2021 to 250,000 in 2025, and the total number of candidates in 2026 is 393,700 (estimated at about 251,000 for Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 63.8%), with the candidate pool continuing to expand and competition intensifying. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch rose from 397 in 2021 to 426 in 2025, showing a steady increase. Minzu University of China is located in Beijing, making it a cross-province application for Hubei candidates. Its enrollment scale in Hubei is moderate (about 90 for Physics Category), with no special local regional preference effects.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of ranking recovery to 15562 in 2025, a slight enrollment expansion of 3.3% in 2026, a continuous increase of about 0.55% in Hubei Physics Category candidates, and the steady rise of the university's Soft Science ranking to 79th, the easing effect of expansion on competition is slightly greater than the pressure from increased candidates. However, the sustained high popularity of engineering majors attracts high-scoring candidates to compete. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be about 15903, with a range of 15403–16403.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Information and Computing Science
- Statistics (Statistics, Applied Statistics)
- Nanomaterials and Technology
- Digital Economy
- Law (Law, Law (International Rule of Law)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics (Economics, Finance, Financial Science, International Economics and Trade)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Accounting, Financial Management, Human Resource Management)
- Journalism and Communication (Journalism, Advertising, Network and New Media)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, Translation)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Science, Ecology)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science, Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 15403–16403, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 15400), you can focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 16400), you should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors like Chinese Language and Literature and Law are socially popular and recommended, while teacher/education majors show differentiation and are to be observed.
